title: Mid-Level Radiologist at Boehringer Ingelheim India Holdings Services

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Radiologist at Boehringer Ingelheim India Holdings Services
jsonLd.description:
Boehringer Ingelheim India Holdings Services has an exciting opening for a Radiologist at our Indore office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Boehringer Ingelheim India Holdings Services:
Boehringer Ingelheim India Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in CPT Codes

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Boehringer Ingelheim India Holdings Services!
